creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Oct 13, 2009 at 11:00:07PM +0200, Diego Depaoli wrote:
> On Tue, Oct 13, 2009 at 5:25 AM, Wesley Shields <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:
> >
> > This patch does not apply cleanly - specifically pkg-plist has rejects.
> > Can you please look into this.
> I do not get this error. Patch goes right without rejects.
> Try this one, but (on my system) no differences from the previous.

Thanks, this one applied correctly. I have a feeling it may be due to
the non-ASCII characters in the plist.

I'll review and commit over the next few days.

-- WXS
